latest.title: whales don't just sing they whisper
latest.script_key: whales don t sing that low rumble you hear is a whisper their pitch drops so low it travels 10 000 miles underwater because the ocean carries low frequencies farther that s why you barely see them open their mouths they re still talking but what would you shout if you could whisper across oceans

latest.title: Rock layers store ancient environments in stripes
